context: Roots Martial Arts Academy reimbursement policy for the owner (Angela Fry) and contract instructor (Tomás Ferreira). Small-business cash basis; CPA Linda Vasquez reviews quarterly.
policy_name: Roots Martial Arts Academy — Instructor & Owner Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.notes: Photo or PDF attached in QuickBooks.
validation_rules.requirement: Itemized receipt for any expense over $25

validation_rules.notes: Charged to equipment fund where available.
validation_rules.requirement: Pre-approval by owner for mats, berimbaus, or uniforms over $150
Log date, destination, and miles for academy travel
Itinerary and registration for capoeira events (e.g., Oakland/Mestre Pintado)
Any single expense over $500 needs owner sign-off
